overview.post_name: Recruitment for Various Posts of Isolated Categories

post_parameters_detailed.Qualification: University Degree in Law with 3 years standing practice as a Pleader at Bar. Serving Railway employees with 5 years service also eligible.
post_parameters_detailed.PwBD_Suitability: B, LV, OA, OL, BL, OAL, LC, DW, AAV

post_parameters_detailed.Qualification: Master's Degree in Hindi/English with English/Hindi as elective/medium at Degree level AND Recognized Diploma/Certificate in Translation or 2 years experience.
post_parameters_detailed.PwBD_Suitability: B, LV, D, HH, OA, OL, BL, OAL, CP, LC, DW, AAV

medical_standards.Visual_Acuity: Distant: 6/9, 6/12 with/without glasses (max 4D). Near: Sn 0.6. Must pass Colour/Night/Binocular vision tests.
Distant: 6/12, 6/18 with/without glasses. Near: Sn 0.6 with/without glasses.
Distant: 6/12, Nil with/without glasses. Near: Sn 0.6 with/without glasses.

Exam_Details.Negative_Marking: 1/3rd of marks for each wrong answer
Exam_Details.Shortlisting_for_TT: 10 times the vacancies based on CBT merit
Exam_Details.Shortlisting_for_DV: Based on CBT merit (and TT qualification where applicable)

important_instructions: Only ONE application allowed per candidate across all RRBs. Multiple applications lead to rejection of all.
Signatures must be in running handwriting; CAPITAL LETTERS NOT ACCEPTABLE.
LASIK surgery candidates may be eligible for B1 standard if surgery was at least 1 year prior and residual corneal thickness is >425 microns.
Modification fee applies for each correction session; chosen RRB and 'Create Account' details cannot be modified.
